steps.title: Read the actual point
steps.content: At $x=1$, the plotted data point is about $(1,12)$. That is the actual $y$-value.

steps.title: Read the predicted value
steps.content: For the predicted value, use the line of best fit at the same $x$-value. At $x=1$, the line is about $y=11$.

steps.title: Compare actual and predicted
steps.content: The difference is about $12-11=1$, so choice A is correct.
